description: Data about manufacturing and sales of bicycles and their components.

measures.expression: [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]-[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
measures.name: Cost

measures.expression: [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]  -  [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
measures.name: Internet Gross Profit

measures.expression: ( [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]  -  [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]) / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]
measures.name: Internet Gross Profit Margin

measures.expression:
iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 1,true,false) , null , 
   iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
   [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))
measures.name: YTD

measures.expression:
iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 1,true,false) , null , 
   iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
   [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))
measures.name: YTD_2

measures.expression:
iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 2,true,false) , null , 
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],
Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Month],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))
measures.name: MTD

measures.expression:
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
measures.name: TY

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember ))
measures.name: LY

measures.expression:
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
measures.name: Current

measures.expression: [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
measures.name: Previous

measures.expression:
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
measures.name: Actual Cost

measures.expression: [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
measures.name: Benchmark Cost

measures.expression: [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]/[Measures].[Customer Count]
measures.name: Measure

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]
measures.name: Difference Internet Sales Amount %

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]/([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember)))-1
measures.name: Measure_1

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Internet Order Count] - ([Measures].[Internet Order Count] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Order Count]
measures.name: Difference Internet Order Count %

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Internet Gross Profit] - ([Measures].[Internet Gross Profit] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Gross Profit]
measures.name: Difference Internet Gross Margin %

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Customer Count] - ([Measures].[Customer Count] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Customer Count]
measures.name: Difference Customer Count %

measures.expression: ([Measures].[Amount] - ([Measures].[Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Amount]
measures.name: Difference Amount %

measures.expression: iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Sales Amount %] > 0, true, "")
measures.name: calcInternetSales

measures.expression: iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Order Count %] > 0, true, "")
measures.name: calcOrderCount

measures.expression: iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Gross Margin %] > 0, true, "")
measures.name: calcGM

measures.expression: iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Gross Margin %] > 0, true, "")
measures.name: calcCM

name: Adventure Works NoSpark

levels.description: Date format is MMMM dd YYYY
levels.name: Delivery Date

attrib.description:
Fully qualified date on which order was placed. 
It can be used to extract month, year week etc for orders.
attrib.name: Date

H_11.expression:
IIf([Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember is [Order Date].[Order Date].defaultmember, 
(([Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.LastChild - [Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.LastChild.PrevMember)/iif([Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.LastChild.PrevMember=0,NULL,[Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.LastChild.PrevMember)),
(([Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember - [Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.PrevMember)/iif([Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.PrevMember=0,NULL,[Order Date].[Order Date].currentmember.PrevMember)))

attributes.description:
Fully qualified date on which order was placed. 
It can be used to extract month, year week etc for orders.
attributes.name: Date

levels.description: Possible values are like Cars, Cycles etc..
levels.name: Category
